source_transcript_segments.text: Smart people don't make goals now.
High smart people have stopped making goals.
And I'll tell you why.
Do you know what's the craziest thing about me?
Six months ago, I was sitting in my room,
staring at my diary.
There were a lot of goals in it.
To get a feed, to do good in studies,
to grow a YouTube channel,
big dreams.
I was happy to hear this,
but the truth is that one of them didn't complete one goal.
And the most embarrassing thing is that I had written those goals two years ago.
I myself was worried about what is wrong in me, why can't I stay consistent, how can people stay?
I was worried about myself.
I tried all that, smart goals, visualization, vision board, timetable, everything
but the result was zero. One day I was very frustrated and called my old friends.
He was a topper from his school time. He always came first.
Even today he is very good in studies and along with him there is a business and youtube channel
which is gradually growing. No one showed, no other motivation.
He was just quiet.
He just keeps working hard.
I thought he must have made very big goals.
So I asked him, what are the goals of this year?
He laughed and said, I don't set goals.
I said, what?
He said, yes, I haven't set a single goal since last 3 years.
I was shocked.
How did he do so much without goals?
Then he told me a secret.
I don't follow goals, I follow the system.
He explained to me that I have to top the goals.
I have to count the weight of the 10.
But how will you do it?
How will you do it? There is no idea.
No idea.
It is like saying that I have to go to Dubai but there is no plan for a ticket passport.
But the system says that I have to study for 6-7 hours to top it.
Goals say that I have to grow YouTube but the system says that I have to upload 2 videos every week.
Understand this well that the goal is only a dream, the system is an action and a way to take you there.
He told me his real system, he studies for 7-8 hours daily to do good in studies.
He does it in a fly mode and reviews it every week
He told me that I have to study for 7-8 hours daily to do good in studies.
And he does the idea research for YouTube
He writes it on a script, edits it and uploads it
He doesn't give any excuses
Whether he is in mood or not, he follows the system
His results are automatically good
He never gets tensed by 100 subscribers or top rank
And after that day, I stopped chasing goals and started making the system
And after 6 months of guesswork, I changed as much as I did in 2 years
The biggest thing is that it all starts looking easy
because I stopped running after numbers and focused on daily actions.
There are three major benefits of making a system.
You become stage-free, just follow the system and the result will come automatically.
The second benefit is that it creates a habit.
Goals are temporary.
The system becomes life-style.
The third benefit is that you also work in the worst day.
Motivation comes or does not come, the system will continue.
For example, you don't come every day, you are in a mood or not.
First, I want to be a productive goal.
Then I made a system, wake up at 5 in the morning, clean the bed, drink water, do important work for 90 minutes, don't run the phone as soon as you wake up.
Then I want to make a system.
Now I don't need to be a product, I just follow the system and the product comes by itself.
The most important line to remember is to give directions from the goal, but the system progresses.
If you want to stop the goal, you will have to study with the system daily.
Now let's see how to make the system.
Step number one, start small.
Write 50 words, some good books.
Write 40 words, read 5 pages from a good book.
Do 20 push-ups daily.
Do such easy work that you don't want to refuse.
Step 2. Build consistently.
Do a little but do it daily.
Don't be too busy.
I'll do more today so that I don't have to do anything tomorrow.
End this nonsense.
Step number 3.
Do system track results.
This is so much weight-loss.
See if you've worked out today or not.
If you've studied today or not.
If you've followed the routine today or not.
The result will come by itself and it will be a shockingly.
The result will come by itself.
